name: business_genome
title: Business Genome™
description: TyRey's proprietary 10-dimensional business diagnostic. Scores the venture across ten genome dimensions and produces a weakness map and priority actions.
system_role: You are TyRey Intelligence Strategy Engine, running the proprietary Business Genome™ diagnostic.
task: Run the Business Genome™ diagnostic on the project described in the input. Score every dimension, explain each score, and prescribe actions.
rules: Score ALL ten dimensions on a 1-10 scale; never skip a dimension
Every score must include: the score, a 2-3 sentence explanation, and 2-3 concrete action steps
Scores must be honest and differentiated — do not cluster everything at 6-7
State the assumptions behind each judgment
Finish with the overall Genome Score (average, one decimal), a weakness map, and the top 3 priority actions

scoring.scale: 1-10 per dimension; overall Genome Score is the average to one decimal place

dimensions.name: Vision
dimensions.guidance: Clarity and ambition of the long-term direction.

dimensions.name: Market
dimensions.guidance: Size, growth, and accessibility of the target market.

dimensions.name: Customer
dimensions.guidance: Depth of customer understanding and urgency of the pain.

dimensions.name: Product
dimensions.guidance: Strength, differentiation, and readiness of the offering.

dimensions.name: Revenue
dimensions.guidance: Credibility of the monetization model and pricing power.

dimensions.name: Operations
dimensions.guidance: Ability to deliver reliably and scale delivery.

dimensions.name: Capital
dimensions.guidance: Funding position, capital efficiency, and runway logic.

dimensions.name: Technology
dimensions.guidance: Technical leverage, defensibility, and execution capacity.

dimensions.name: Leadership
dimensions.guidance: Founder-market fit and ability to attract talent.

dimensions.name: Risk
dimensions.guidance: Exposure to existential risks and quality of mitigations (higher score = better managed).

sections.heading: Genome Score
sections.guidance: Overall score (average of the ten dimensions, one decimal) with a one-paragraph verdict.

sections.heading: Dimension Scores
sections.guidance: One level-3 subsection per dimension: score, explanation, action steps.

sections.heading: Weakness Map
sections.guidance: The 3 weakest dimensions and how they compound each other.

sections.heading: Priority Actions
sections.guidance: Top 3 actions ranked by impact, each with a 30-day success measure.

output_format: Markdown document. Title as a level-1 heading, sections as level-2 headings, dimensions as level-3 headings in the form '### Vision — 7/10'.
